title: DountSMPCLONE
description: An advanced SMP plugin featuring Shop
body:
## DonutSMP

DonutSMP is a powerful and modern PaperMC plugin for Minecraft 1.21.1 that brings new survival-based SMP features.

### ✨ Features
- Shop system for buying and selling items
- Vault-based economy support
- Custom cars and fuel management (optional add-on)
- Owner-based vehicles and permissions
- Works with Paper 1.21.1+
- Simple configuration and setup

### 💡 Future updates
- More vehicle types
- Player shops and auctions
- Dynamic UI improvements
